chunks.text:
Lavinia Properties

Lavinia Properties is a UAE-based real estate services company offering property listings, brokerage, and investment opportunities across Dubai's property market.

Tagline: Your Trusted Real Estate Partner in Dubai

Services:
- Property sales and purchases
- Real estate brokerage
- Property listings and marketing
- Investment consultation
- Property management

Key Areas: Dubai, UAE.

Contact Information:
- Phone: 554612774
- Email: laviniapropertie@gmail.com
- Website: https://laviniaproperties.ae/
- Address: Dubai, UAE
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/laviniaproperties/

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Lavinia Properties — a real estate agency in Dubai, UAE.

Location: Dubai, UAE

Services: - Property sales and purchases
- Real estate brokerage
- Property listings and marketing

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting the company directly at 554612774 or laviniapropertie@gmail.com
- Respond in the same language the user writes in
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail needed)
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to **Lavinia Properties**! How can I help you find your perfect property?
